findings.description: eval in Helm shell scripts for variable indirection is CWE-78. Replaced with case dispatch.
findings.proposedRule: P31: No eval in Helm shell scripts — use case dispatch for variable indirection

findings.description: Chart unit tests were not updated when bootstrap template was rewritten. CI failed independently of Python tests.
findings.proposedRule: P32: Update chart unit tests alongside template changes — CI runs them independently

findings.description: Initial implementation only handled 201/409 for all Polaris operations. Grant PUT returns 204, assign returns 200/204.
findings.proposedRule: P33: Full idempotency codes for Polaris REST by operation type

findings.description: Unit tests reading E2E conftest source as text creates fragile cross-tier coupling.
findings.proposedRule: P35: No cross-tier text-parsing tests — structural tests belong in the same tier as the code they inspect

findings.description: Declining PR suggestions without explaining the policy rationale wastes reviewer time and misses a teaching opportunity.
findings.proposedRule: P34: When declining due to policy, name the policy, explain the rationale, offer an alternative
